ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* City where the user is active */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user is using */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "steps_per_minute" REAL /* Number of steps taken per minute */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the activity */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music track associated with the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music track */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist who created the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the music track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the music track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track added to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)
